calendar.matters:
Hearing On Petition For Appointment Of Third Appraiser
Off Calendar Sep-12-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
* Defendant FRED JOHNSON's petition for appointment of third appraiser is O F F
C A L E N D A R per moving party. (JJM/301/CL) Hon. JAMES J. McBRIDE, Court Reporter Eric Throne, CSR 7855

Hearing On Petition For Appointment Of Third Appraiser
Off Calendar Aug-26-2002 Continued To Sep-12-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

Hearing On Petition For Appointment Of Third Appraiser
Off Calendar Jul-31-2002 Continued To Sep-04-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
I-Wei Wang, Esq. of COBLENTZ, PATCH, DUFFY & BASS 391-4800 for defendants SKS/FBOP ASSOCIATES LLP, et al.
Andrew W. Schwartz, Deputy City Attorney 554-4620 for Plaintiff CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
* Re appointment of a third appraisser. The Court continued this matter from yesterday. Both counsel represented in open court that they have reached an agreement regarding a process in which the third appraiser is to be selected. Matter continued to SEPTEMBER 4, 2002 for notification regarding third appraiser. Hon. JAMES J. McBRIDE (301/cl); Court Reporter ERIC L. THRONE, CSR 7855

Hearing On Petition For Appointment Of Third Appraiser
Off Calendar Jul-30-2002 Continued To Jul-31-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jonathan Bass, Esq. and I-Wei Wang, Esq. of COBLENTZ, PATCH, DUFFY & BASS 391-4800 for defendants SKS/FBOP ASSOCIATES LLP, et al. moving for appointment of third appraiser
Andrew W. Schwartz, Deputy City Attorney 554-4620 for Plaintiff CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO opposing party
* A R G U E D and the Court continued this matter to JULY 31, 2002. If both counsel cannot agree to the appointment of an appraiser, then they are to submit a clean list with resumes of the proposed appraisers and then the Court will pick one. Hon. JAMES J. McBRIDE (301/cl); Court Reporter ERIC L. THRONE, CSR 7855

Hearing On Petition For Appointment Of Third Appraiser
Off Calendar Jul-24-2002 Continued To Jul-30-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's petition for appointment of third appraiser is
C O N T I N U E D T O July 30, 2002 on the Court's own motion. (AJR) Patricia M. Evezich, CSR 1193
